---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Nexus OS
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

A clear and concise description of the problem this feature would solve.

> Example: "I'm always frustrated when ..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

### CLI Interface (if applicable)

```bash
# How would this feature be used from the CLI?
naos <command> <args>
```

### Configuration (if applicable)

```yaml
# How would this be configured in nexus.config.yaml?
feature:
  enabled: true
  option: value
```

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered and why they don't fully address the problem.

## Use Cases

Who would benefit from this feature? Describe specific scenarios:

1. **Scenario A:** ...
2. **Scenario B:** ...

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, references, or links about the feature request here.

## Willingness to Contribute

- [ ] I would be willing to submit a PR to implement this feature
- [ ] I would be willing to help test this feature
- [ ] I can provide more detailed specifications if needed
